zh.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Charles Pilkington於大約1430年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普時，他的父親Robert Pilkington33歲，母親Joan Rawson31歲。他和Elizabeth Gateford至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1484年7月在英國享年55歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Charles Pilkington于大约1430年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普时，他的父亲Robert Pilkington33岁，母亲Joan Rawson31岁。他和Elizabeth Gateford至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1484年7月在英国享年55岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Charles Pilkington was born about 1430, in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Robert Pilkington, was 33 and his mother, Joan Rawson, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Gateford. He died in July 1484, in England, at the age of 55, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Charles Pilkington est né environ 1430, à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Pilkington, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Rawson, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Gateford. Il est décédé en juillet 1484, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Charles Pilkington um 1430 in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Pilkington 33 und seine Mutter Joan Rawson 31. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Gateford mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Juli 1484 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Charles Pilkington è nato il circa 1430 nel Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Pilkington, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Rawson, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Gateford. Morì nel luglio 1484, nel England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Blackburn, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルン
ja.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Charles Pilkingtonが約1430年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップで生まれた時，父Robert Pilkingtonは33歳，母Joan Rawsonは31歳であった。彼はElizabeth Gatefordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1484年7月にイギリスで55歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Charles Pilkington(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Pilkington(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Rawson(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Gateford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 7월 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Charles Pilkington nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Pilkington, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rawson, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Elizabeth Gateford. Ele faleceu em julho de 1484, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Charles Pilkington родился около 1430 г. в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Pilkington было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Rawson, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Gateford. Он умер июль 1484 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Charles Pilkington nació aproximadamente 1430, en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Pilkington, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Rawson, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Elizabeth Gateford. Murió en julio de 1484, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
